title: To amend the Intermodal Surface Transportation Efficiency Act of 1991 to designate a portion of United States Route 74 in North Carolina as a future interstate, and for other purposes.
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Highways and Transit.
crs_summary: This bill designates U.S. Route 74 from Columbus, North Carolina, to Kings Mountain, North Carolina, as (1) a high priority corridor on the National Highway System, and (2) a future part of the Interstate System.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Highways and Transit.
